div.h2: Hotel End of Day â€“ GM Report

div.div: Hotel End of Day â€“ v3.4 (GM)

div.h2: Hotel End of Day â€“ Finance Report 3.4

span.t-esc: formatLang(sum([c.get('revenue',0.0) for c in channels]), currency_obj=currency)
formatLang(sum([m.get('revenue',0.0) for m in markets]), currency_obj=currency)

div.h3: Revenue Breakdown â€“ By Room Type

span.t-esc: formatLang(sum([r.get('revenue',0.0) for r in room_types]), currency_obj=currency)

div.h3: Revenue Breakdown â€“ By Payment Method

span.t-esc: formatLang(sum([m.get('revenue',0.0) for m in payment_methods]), currency_obj=currency)

t.t-value: sum([m.get('revenue',0.0) for m in payment_summary]) or sum(orders.mapped('amount_total'))

t.p: No payment data for this period.

t.h4: Appendix B â€“ Detailed Revenue Orders
Appendix B â€“ Detailed Revenue Orders (hidden)

t.p: Detailed revenue orders appendix is disabled for this report.

span.t-esc: formatLang(sum([l.get('revenue') for l in snapshots]), currency_obj=currency)
